name: Rolling 24h Token Poster
description: Collect rolling last-24-hours AI token usage and render a shareable aitokenweight poster image.

currentTokenUsage.description: Prompt for a remote agent to report exact rolling 24h token usage, clearly labeled calendar-day/session fallback, or usage_unavailable without using defaults.

strictUsagePolicy.onMissingExactUsage: Return usage_unavailable and do not call renderPoster.
acceptedEvidence: timestamped local logs filtered to now minus 24 hours through now
current session CLI/runtime final usage line
trace/span/local log entry for the current session
provider usage endpoint result scoped to the rolling last 24 hours

inputs.usage: DailyTokenUsage with exact rolling 24h token evidence, or clearly labeled day/session fallback; required before rendering

requires.reason: Provider usage APIs and local logs may expose account or project activity. Ask the user before reading them.

collectUsage.description: Read exact rolling 24h usage evidence and normalize it to DailyTokenUsage, or return a clearly labeled day/session fallback or usage_unavailable without rendering.

renderPoster.description: Render a DailyTokenUsage object into a PNG using the aitokenweight browser template.

bootstrapRemote.command: git clone https://github.com/susyimes/aitokenweight.git && cd aitokenweight && npm ci && npx playwright install chromium
bootstrapRemote.description: Bootstrap the skill runtime on a new machine from the public GitHub repository.

renderPoster.description: Deterministically render poster.png from a DailyTokenUsage JSON file using the local browser template.

renderPosterFromExactTotal.description: Render only after the agent has exact rolling 24h token usage evidence, or a clearly labeled day/session fallback. Do not substitute demo or default values.

freshMachineFlow: if exact rolling 24h token usage is available: write usage.json with scope rolling_24h and run npm run render:poster -- --usage usage.json --out dist/aitokenweight-poster.png
if no exact rolling 24h, calendar-day, or session usage is available: return usage_unavailable and do not render
notes: Use rawDiscoveryUrl/rawSkillManifestUrl when the agent can read HTTP but cannot clone immediately.
Use cloneUrl when the agent needs bundled scripts, package-lock.json, and the browser renderer.
If a host machine already has Chrome available, render-poster can fall back to the local Chrome channel.

template.name: aitokenweight
template.recommendedRenderer: Open the posterUrlTemplate in a browser automation runtime and screenshot targetSelector at deviceScaleFactor 2.

boundaries.anpLayer: Discovery, identity, interface metadata, and invocation envelope.
boundaries.applicationLayer: Token usage collection, usage normalization, and PNG rendering.
boundaries.trustBoundary: Energy conversion is a social estimate, not billing, telemetry, energy auditing, or carbon accounting.
